name: esp-idf-uart
description: Espressif ESP32-family UART console (ESP-IDF / Arduino-ESP32 ROM + app boot log over USB-UART). First boot stage matches the 'ESP-ROM:' banner or the 'rst:0x..' reset-reason line (Arduino cores may cold-boot without ESP-ROM). No interactive shell assumed - use pin reset or your flasher for a fresh banner. Baud typically 115200.
commands: /* no default shell - reset the MCU and read the boot banner */
